db_lock_check.note: No current holder on invest/stages/stage1/outputs/db/stage1_raw_archive.sqlite3 at checkpoint time.

pdf_artifacts.note: Telegram attachment PDF manifests and page artifacts remain present; prior 01:00 checkpoint authoritative continuity numbers were 127467 docs / 18765 pages / text+renders 1197.

decision.why: Active daily_update processes still exist, raw DB has no current holder, and telegram evidence gap is not sufficient proof to start another rebuild or DB-touching writer.

blocked.reason: Telegram Stage2 clean outputs still do not expose LinkEnriched/LinkEnrichment evidence even though authoritative Stage2 meta is link_enrichment_enabled=true; meanwhile active news_backfill/telegram_fast daily_update.py processes (PID 8443, 8753) mean duplicate rebuild/writer attempts remain unsafe.
blocked.next_action: At next checkpoint, first verify whether PID 8443/8753 exit or advance their status files; if idle/finished and no DB holder exists, inspect whether telegram fallback formatting intentionally omits enrichment markers versus a regression before considering any single rebuild.
